title: Client compatibility: Ivory and Phanpy
description: Full end-to-end manual testing of Ivory (iOS) and Phanpy (web) against a real smallhold instance. Test every column in the clients.md matrix: Login, Timeline, Post, Media, Reply, Notifications, Streaming. Document and fix every failure. These are the two highest-priority clients.
design: Test against production-like smallhold instance. Ivory: test on actual iOS device or simulator. Phanpy: test in browser. For each test: check network requests with browser dev tools or proxy to identify exact API calls that fail. Fix by matching mastodon.social response shapes.
acceptance_criteria: docs/clients.md shows Ivory and Phanpy rows complete with all checkmarks; login flow completes without errors; home timeline loads; can post text, post with image, reply to a post; notifications appear; streaming updates appear in real time without manual refresh
